column76: The customer wanted to know if recharging 228 taka would add the amount to their main account balance. The agent informed the customer that the recharge amount would be added to the main balance. However, the agent failed to identify that there is a 228 taka minute pack which is automatically activated through trigger recharge. If the customer recharges 228 taka on their number, the minute pack will be activated on their SIM instead of being added to the main balance.
